title: Ostraka UI Cards
html_prompt: Create a single-file HTML/CSS/JS preview for an EC LAB three-card visual identity layout. Preserve a tall card grid composition with bold pink and soft blue panels, large clean sans-serif typography, minimal arrow marks, simple EC logo SVG shapes, strong negative space, and rounded poster-card geometry. Use only inline HTML, CSS, SVG, gradients, shadows, and text. Do not use external assets, CDN, frameworks, Google Fonts, custom font files, real brand names, watermarks, author names, or platform names. Use EC LAB, ec 的实验室, AI Workflow, Design, Prompt, Code, Inspiration, and Reusable Assets as the identity system. Follow EC font sets and EC radius tokens. Make the layout responsive while keeping the three-card editorial rhythm.

css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
